meaning: 曼德维尔(14世纪英国作家,著有<<约翰·曼德维尔爵士航海及旅行记>>,内容多取材于百科全书及他人的游记,关于他的种种传说,无从确证)
examples: In other years Games for the Disabled are still held at Stoke Mandeville.
Wenlock and Mandeville are animated figures depicting steel from a steelworks in Bolton.
The first Games for athletes with a disability were held in 1948 in Stoke Mandeville, England.
The report stated 22 offences happened at Stoke Mandeville, and also named Wycombe General.
Sure, Wenlock and Mandeville need to look good -- but they also need to sell.
